title: psychotria aurantiibractea
intro: Psychotria aurantiibractea, also known as Yellow Bract Psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Psychotria aurantiibractea are attributed to its ability to treat various conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In terms of herbal preparations, Psychotria aurantiibractea is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
